data.title: Scalable Backend Infrastructure
data.description: The backend is designed to handle millions of users simultaneously with minimal latency.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Erlang for concurrent requests, MySQL for data storage, and custom memory storage techniques.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption Framework
data.description: WhatsApp employs end-to-end encryption to ensure message confidentiality.
data.technical_spec: Based on Signal Protocol, uses Curve25519, AES-256, and HMAC-SHA256.

data.title: Cross-Platform Compatibility
data.description: The architecture supports multiple mobile and desktop platforms seamlessly.
data.technical_spec: Native iOS and Android apps with Electron wrapper for desktop applications.

data.title: Real-time Communication Protocols
data.description: Designed for real-time messaging with minimal delays.
data.technical_spec: Uses MQTT protocol optimized for mobile networks.

data.title: Efficient Multimedia Sharing
data.description: Architected to allow fast multimedia messaging with minimal data usage.
data.technical_spec: Media is compressed and optimized, stored in a distributed server network.
